name: io.github.freegamestore-online/mcp
description: Build, publish, and improve games on FreeGameStore from your editor: create_game/update_files (your model authors) or agent_build (the VibeCode agent authors), plus deploy status, SDK docs, and game info.

tools.name: create_game
tools.description: Provision repo+R2 hosting+listing, scaffold a template, push → live at <id>.freegamestore.online

tools.name: update_files
tools.description: Write/overwrite files in a game you own → auto-deploys (improve loop)

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read one file from a game's repo

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in a game's repo

tools.name: agent_build
tools.description: Hand a prompt to the VibeCode agent — it writes the code AND deploys (bring-your-own AI key)

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Poll a VibeCode agent build session — game id, deploy phase, live URL

tools.name: list_games
tools.description: List your published games (requires FGS session token)

tools.name: deploy_status
tools.description: Check GitHub Actions deploy status for any game (last 5 runs)

tools.name: game_info
tools.description: Get live URL, repo, store listing, and up/down status for any game

tools.name: game_logs
tools.description: Latest deploy/build logs for a game

tools.name: platform_guide
tools.description: Fetch the full SKILLS.md platform guide
